testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dispatch_stock_deduction.py:153: in test_04_dispatch_creation_does_not_deduct_stock assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create dispatch: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create dispatch: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","dispatch_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","sku"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","phone"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","address"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","reason"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","order_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","payment_reference"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","invoice_file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
